// AUTO-GENERATED by kyo-ffi-codegen v1. DO NOT EDIT.
// Regenerate via `sbt compile` after modifying the binding trait.

package kyo.example

import scala.scalajs.js
import scala.scalajs.js.annotation.*
import scala.scalajs.js.typedarray.*
import scala.scalajs.reflect.annotation.EnableReflectiveInstantiation
import kyo.ffi.*
import kyo.ffi.internal.{AbiCheck, JsRawSegment, KoffiFacade, KoffiFn, NativeLoader, StructAbiCheck}

@EnableReflectiveInstantiation final class ArrayBindingsImpl extends ArrayBindings:
    import ArrayBindingsImpl.*

    def sum(xs: Array[Int], n: Int)(using kyo.AllowUnsafe): Int =
        val retVal = facade.sum(xs, n).asInstanceOf[Int]
        retVal
end ArrayBindingsImpl

object ArrayBindingsImpl:
    AbiCheck.verify(1, "kyo.example.ArrayBindings")
    private val facade = KoffiFacade.load(
        NativeLoader.jsResolve("kyo_arr"),
        Seq(
            KoffiFn("sum", "sum_ints", "int", Seq[js.Any]("int*".asInstanceOf[js.Any], "int".asInstanceOf[js.Any]))
        )
    )
end ArrayBindingsImpl
